sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n108638" key="u(pokuberna/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑποκῠβερνάω</orth>, <sense id="n108638.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be under-pilot,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">νεώς</foreign> of a ship, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:98" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.98</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
